PostToolUse.command: STATE="$PROJECT_ROOT/.agents/.session-state" && touch "$STATE" && COUNT=$(head -1 "$STATE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)) && printf '%d\n' "$COUNT" > "$STATE" && if [ $((COUNT % 10)) -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":true,"systemMessage":"📋 Session checkpoint: '"$COUNT"' tool calls. Remember to log new patterns to .agents/skills/learnings.md. If you created new conventions or patterns, run /update-skills. Docs changed? Run /generate-docs."}'; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi
